shortDescription: "A control-flow graph node (other than the exit node) can have zero outgoing edges"
shortCorrection: "Except for the exit node, all control-flow graph nodes have outgoing edges"

A CFG can contain nodes (besides the exit node) that have no outgoing arrows.

frontmatter.shortDescription: A control-flow graph node (other than the exit node) can have zero outgoing edges
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Except for the exit node, all control-flow graph nodes have outgoing edges
